tasks.subject: Task 0: Dev environment + repo scaffold
tasks.description:
Install PowerShell 7 + Pester on macOS; create dot-source-guarded script skeleton + Pester harness. Verify: scaffold Pester test passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pwsh 7.x present", "Pester >=5 imports", "both files parse"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Default configuration (GUID pattern + skip-list)
tasks.description:
Add Get-DefaultNamePattern (GUID regex) and Get-DefaultSkipList (system container names) as pure functions with tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GUID regex matches bare+brace GUID, not descriptive names", "skip-list has well-known system names"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Pure classifier Get-KeyContainerDisposition
tasks.description:
Implement OS-agnostic classifier with precedence Referenced>SystemKey>NonMatchingName>TooNew>OrphanCandidate; full Mac test coverage.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 5 statuses correct", "precedence exact", "case-insensitive keep-map", "null age fails safe to keep"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Reporting Format-KeyDisposition + Show filter
tasks.description:
Add Format-KeyDisposition deriving Action from status/ResultMap and filtering by -Show; OS-agnostic, Mac-tested.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["action derivation correct", "ResultMap overrides", "Show filters work"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Windows CryptoAPI enumeration Get-CapiKeyContainer
tasks.description:
P/Invoke advapi32 to enumerate CAPI containers (friendly+unique names) across RSA CSP providers; pure path builder Mac-tested; Windows tests skip-tagged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["path builder correct both scopes", "non-Windows throws", "script parses clean"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Certificate keep-set builder Get-CertificateKeyReference
tasks.description:
Build keep-map from all cert stores (both scopes) incl. REQUEST; resolve UniqueKeyContainerName; count gaps. Windows-only.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["KeepMap+GapCount returned", "REQUEST store included", "CNG not a gap, unreadable CAPI is", "non-Windows throws"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Backup + deletion Remove-CapiKeyContainer
tasks.description:
Backup key file then delete container via CRYPT_DELETEKEYSET with file-delete fallback; pure manifest-row builder Mac-tested.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["manifest row fields correct", "backup precedes delete", "API-then-file-fallback", "non-Windows throws"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Orchestrator Invoke-OrphanedCapiKeyCleanup
tasks.description:
Wire preconditions (elevation, keep-set-gap gate), enumeration, keep-set, classification, reporting, gated deletion; injectable seams for Mac testing.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["injectable providers", "dry-run never deletes", "gap gate aborts execute", "deletes only orphans", "machine needs elevation"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Full-suite green + syntax lint + README runbook
tasks.description:
Run full Pester suite, parse-check script, optional PSScriptAnalyzer, write README (usage, 4 keep-layers, Windows runbook with assumptions A & B).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile -c \"Invoke-Pester -Path ./Remove-OrphanedCapiKeys.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["suite 0 failed", "script parses", "README complete with runbook"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
